source_files_identified.expected_solution: Agent identifies the pass manager, pass definition, and concrete pass implementation files The answer must reference the canonical artifact(s) for this checkpoint at the pinned revision (basenames: passes.def, passes.cc, pass_manager.h, tree-ssa-dce.cc, and tree-pass.h). The judge looks for the following concept tokens in the agent output: path.
evaluation_criteria: Cites at least one canonical file by basename (passes.def, passes.cc, pass_manager.h, tree-ssa-dce.cc, and tree-pass.h) in the agent output
Mentions at least three of the canonical concept tokens: path
Connects the source artifacts to their downstream impact in the consumer code path

symbols_identified.expected_solution: Agent identifies key structs/functions in the pass registration chain The answer must reference the canonical artifact(s) for this checkpoint at the pinned revision (basenames: passes.def, passes.cc, pass_manager.h, tree-ssa-dce.cc, and tree-pass.h). The judge looks for the following concept tokens in the agent output: opt_pass, pass_manager, execute_pass_list, tree_ssa_dce, passes.def.
evaluation_criteria: Cites at least one canonical file by basename (passes.def, passes.cc, pass_manager.h, tree-ssa-dce.cc, and tree-pass.h) in the agent output
Mentions at least three of the canonical concept tokens: opt_pass, pass_manager, execute_pass_list, tree_ssa_dce, and passes.def
Connects the source artifacts to their downstream impact in the consumer code path
